title: Proclamation No. 582, s. 1940
text:
MALACAÑAN PALACE MANILA

PROCLAMATION NO. 582

ESTABLISHING AS FAMY-INFANTA FOREST RESERVE FOR FOREST PROTECTION, TIMBER PRODUCTION AND AESTHETIC PURPOSES A PARCEL OF THE PUBLIC DOMAIN SITUATED IN THE MUNICIPALITIES OF FAMY AND SINILOAN, PROVINCE OF LAGUNA, AND MUNICIPALITY OF INFANTA, PROVINCE OF TAYABAS, ISLAND OF LUZON.

Upon recommendation of the Director of Forestry, approved by the Secretary of Agriculture and Commerce and pursuant to the provisions of section eighteen hundred and twenty-six of Act Numbered Twenty-seven hundred and eleven, known as the Revised Administrative Code, I, Manuel L. Quezon, President of the Philippines, hereby establish for forest protection, timber production and aesthetic purposes the Famy-Infanta Forest Reserve and place it under the administration and control of the Bureau of Forestry, which shall have the authority to regulate the use and occupancy of this reserve and the cutting, collection and removal of timber and other forest products therein in accordance with the Forest Law and Regulations.

I, therefore, withdraw from entry, sale or settlement, and hereby declare and proclaim to be the Famy-Infanta Forest Reserve, subject to private rights if any there be, that portion of the public domain situated in the municipalities of Famy and Siniloan, Province of Laguna and municipality of Infanta, Province of Tayabas, Island of Luzon, and described on Bureau of Forestry Map No. F.R.-99, to wit:

Beginning at corner 1, a tangile tree, 30 cm. in diameter, marked X 1491/28, on south side of trail which is N. 83° E., about 2,650 meters from B. L. L. M. No. 4 of Famy Laguna; thence due north, 270 meters to corner 2, an apitong tree, 50 cm. in diameter, marked X 1491/25, on northeast side of trail: thence N. 37° W., 280 meters to corner 3, a malaruhat tree. 15 cm. in diameter, marked X 1491/18 at junction of trail and creek; R. 52/59 on trail; thence S. 58° W., 280 meters to corner 147, a makaasim tree, 25 cm. in diameter, marked X. R. 1471/26, on north of trail; and thence N. 68° W., 550 meters to corner 1, the point of beginning.

Corners 1 to 20, 29 to 47, 58 to 62 and 153, were marked with official marking hatchet No. B. F. 567; corners 48, 116 and 118 to 152 with B. F. 828; corners 49 to 57, 115 and 117, with B. F. 829; and corners 63 to 75, 75-C to 75-E and 75-G to 114; with B. F. 437.

This forest reserve contains an area of 13,026.800 hectares.

In witness whereof, I have hereunto set my hand and caused the seal of the Commonwealth of the Philippines to be affixed.

Done at the City of Manila, this eighth day of July, in the year of Our Lord, nineteen hundred and forty, and of the Commonwealth of the Philippines, the fifth.

MANUEL L. QUEZON President of the Philippines

By the President: JORGE B. VARGAS Secretary to the President
